presetSeeds.label: Stranger
presetSeeds.intent: Start neutral with low trust and room for discovery.

presetSeeds.label: ศัตรู
presetSeeds.intent: Start hostile with low trust and visible opposition.

presetSeeds.label: ไม่ถูกกัน
presetSeeds.intent: Start with friction and bias, but less severe than enemy.

presetSeeds.label: คู่ปรับ
presetSeeds.intent: Start competitive with some respect and emotional pressure.

presetSeeds.label: คู่กัด
presetSeeds.intent: Start with banter, teasing friction, and push-pull chemistry.

presetSeeds.label: คนรู้จัก
presetSeeds.intent: Start familiar but not close, with low emotional assumption.

presetSeeds.label: Warm close friend
presetSeeds.intent: Start with trust and comfort while preserving slow-burn progression.

presetSeeds.label: เพื่อนตาย
presetSeeds.intent: Start with deep trust, loyalty, and shared history.

presetSeeds.label: Hidden enemy crush
presetSeeds.intent: Start tense, guarded, and emotionally charged.

presetSeeds.label: เพื่อนสนิทคิดไม่ซื่อ
presetSeeds.intent: Preserve friendship comfort while hiding romantic tension.

presetSeeds.label: ลองคุย
presetSeeds.intent: Start exploratory and uncommitted, testing chemistry.

presetSeeds.label: คนคุย
presetSeeds.intent: Start with stronger mutual expectation than casual dating.

presetSeeds.label: แฟน Toxic
presetSeeds.intent: Start romantically attached but low-trust and volatile; portray as conflict, not healthy romance.

presetSeeds.label: คู่แท้
presetSeeds.intent: Start with deep alignment and high trust while keeping user turns meaningful.

runtimeRules: Relationship seeds set the starting tone but user behavior should still matter more over time.
Do not force romance when no-romance constraints are active.
Major relationship events should be optional and surfaced as pending events before entering scene mode.
Cooldowns should prevent repeating confession, break, or fear-lock events too often.
